offering: AI-native film studio delivering high-volume video/film production from prompt to final frame — full-service execution using AI-accelerated production pipelines

core_segments.name: Mobile audio-first platforms expanding into video/microdrama content
core_segments.why: Proven client base (Pocket FM, Kuku FM) — audio platforms scaling to video need massive content volume at costs traditional production can't match; AI production solves their unit economics

core_segments.name: Vertical video / short-form drama streaming apps (microdrama, ReelShort-style platforms)
core_segments.why: Dream clients named (ReelShort, DramaBox, Holywater Tech) — these platforms burn through 100s of episodes and need AI-speed production to compete; content slate = their entire business model

core_segments.name: Regional/language OTT platforms and digital studios launching original video slates
core_segments.why: Existing client (Zee Studios, People Media Factory) — mid-market budgets, high volume needs, regional focus matches 11FPS India strength and pricing tier

core_segments.name: Creator economy platforms and MCNs scaling talent-driven video content
core_segments.why: Individual creator client (Kyra Kumar) suggests platform play — MCNs/platforms managing 10-100+ creators need templated, fast-turnaround video production infrastructure

core_segments.name: EdTech and wellness/fitness apps adding video learning content or YouTube/social expansion
core_segments.why: Akshar Yoga client + emerging platforms (Morphic) — companies moving from text/audio to video courses/social content need production volume without hiring full teams

need_signals: Raised Series A/B funding with stated use case for content production or original content slate
Job postings for Head of Content, VP Original Programming, Content Production Manager, or Video Production roles
Press releases or announcements about launching original series, microdrama slate, or expanding into video from audio
Expansion announcements into new markets/languages requiring localized video content at scale
Partnership announcements with creators, studios, or production companies indicating content volume ramp
Product launches of new content verticals (e.g., audio app adding video, fitness app launching YouTube channel)
Executive hires or promotions in content/programming leadership roles
News about competing with or responding to competitors' content slates (arms race signal)
buyer_language: turn around episodes in days not weeks
production partner who can scale with us
geo: global, with India as core strength — especially targeting India-based platforms and global platforms with India operations or regional content ambitions
exclude: Traditional film production houses and post-production studios (direct competitors)
Major Hollywood/Bollywood studios with full in-house production infrastructure
Enterprise SaaS video tools (competitors in tooling layer)
Live-action heavy productions requiring physical sets/location shooting
Ad agencies focused on brand commercials rather than serialized content
Companies under 20 employees without funding (too early for retainer studio work)
exa_queries: Mobile microdrama and vertical video streaming platforms that raised Series A or Series B funding to produce original serialized content and compete with ReelShort or DramaBox
Audio-first storytelling platforms like Pocket FM or Kuku FM that are expanding into video content production and need high-volume episode creation
Regional OTT platforms and digital entertainment studios in India and Southeast Asia launching original content slates and hiring content production teams
AI-first entertainment companies building interactive stories, audiobooks, or video series that use generative AI and need production partners to scale content output
Creator economy platforms and multi-channel networks hiring heads of content or VP of programming to scale video production across dozens of creators
EdTech wellness and lifestyle apps transitioning from text or audio to video learning content and expanding their YouTube and social media presence with serialized content
